case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A., VS. BETTY MOON YEE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 73516333) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.,
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1788.60(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 73516333) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.,

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210064942) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A., AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, BETTY MOON DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-27-2024
DECLARATION OF PROPER VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 210064942) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.,
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 73516333) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION RE: ACCEPTING COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (TRANSACTION ID # 73516333) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.,
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF REDUCED FILING FEE (TRANSACTION ID # 210064942) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.,

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $254.55 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 73516333) AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, BETTY MOON
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210064942) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.,
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210064942) TO PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.,
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210066856) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A., SERVED MAR-07-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, BETTY MOON
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST AND ATTORNEY'S FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 73516333) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A., RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YEE, BETTY MOON $2,535.00 PRINCIPAL, $560.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $254.55 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,349.55, SEE SCANNED DOC
